_note: The Israelite monarchy (~1050-586 BC), three threads linked to the Davidic spine by real marriages. (1) SAUL'S HOUSE: Kish->Saul (first king), children by Ahinoam; connected to the tree by the real marriage DAVID + MICHAL (Saul's daughter, David's first wife), who was childless (2 Samuel 6:23) so that union has no issue. Saul's tribe of Benjamin is noted on his card rather than drawing the long 1 Chron 8-9 bridge. (2) THE OMRIDE DYNASTY of northern Israel (Omri->Ahab + Jezebel of Tyre; children Ahaziah of Israel, Joram of Israel, and Athaliah), linked into Judah by the real marriage ATHALIAH + JORAM (existing Joram of Judah); Athaliah later seized Judah's throne as sole reigning queen. Scripture is ambiguous on her parentage: 2 Kings 8:18 calls her daughter of Ahab, 8:26 daughter of Omri (i.e. granddaughter) - FLAGGED on her card; she is placed as Ahab's child here. (3) THE NORTHERN KING-LIST (~931-722 BC) as a succession chain rendered king+placeholder->successor (mirroring the Judah chain in 07_biblical), covering the dynasties Matthew's spine omits; usurpations noted on cards. (4) Last kings of JUDAH omitted by Matthew 1, appended as children of Josiah beside the existing Jeconiah line. NOTE: the existing tree simplifies Jehoiachin/Jeconiah as Josiah's son; historically he was Jehoiakim's son (Josiah's grandson). Dates follow the Thiele chronology (reign-start years) and are approximate; they decrease down each descent. Sorts after 07_biblical so DAVID, JORAM, JOSIAH, JOSIAHW exist first.

a.label:
Kish
c.1075 BC · father of Saul, of the tribe of Benjamin · 1 Samuel 9:1
(date approximate)

children.label:
👑 Saul
c.1050 BC · first king of Israel; of the tribe of Benjamin; reigned ~1050-1010 BC · 1 Samuel 9-31

b.label:
Ahinoam
daughter of Ahimaaz; Saul's wife · 1 Samuel 14:50

children.label:
Jonathan
c.1040 BC · Saul's heir & David's friend; fell at Gilboa · 1 Samuel 14, 31

Merab
c.1036 BC · Saul's firstborn daughter · 1 Samuel 14:49

👑 Ish-bosheth (Eshbaal)
c.1032 BC · son of Saul; reigned over Israel ~2 yrs after Saul's death · 2 Samuel 2-4

Michal
c.1030 BC · Saul's younger daughter; David's first wife · 1 Samuel 18:20-27

a.label:
👑 Jeroboam I
c.931 BC · first king of the divided northern kingdom of Israel; not of David's line · 1 Kings 12

children.label:
👑 Nadab
c.910 BC · son of Jeroboam I; king of Israel · 1 Kings 15

👑 Baasha
c.909 BC · king of Israel; usurper who killed Nadab & destroyed the house of Jeroboam · 1 Kings 15

👑 Elah
c.886 BC · son of Baasha; king of Israel · 1 Kings 16

👑 Zimri
c.885 BC · chariot commander; usurper who killed Elah and reigned 7 days · 1 Kings 16

👑 Tibni
c.884 BC · rival claimant to Israel's throne; lost the civil war to Omri · 1 Kings 16:21-22

👑 Omri
c.884 BC · army commander; seized the throne, founded Samaria & the Omride dynasty; reigned ~884-873 BC · 1 Kings 16

👑 Ahab
c.874 BC · son of Omri; king of Israel; married Jezebel of Tyre · 1 Kings 16-22

b.label:
Jezebel
daughter of Ethbaal, king of Tyre & Sidon; queen of Israel · 1 Kings 16:31

children.label:
👑 Ahaziah of Israel
c.853 BC · son of Ahab; died childless, throne passed to his brother Joram · 1 Kings 22, 2 Kings 1

👑 Joram (Jehoram) of Israel
c.852 BC · son of Ahab; last Omride king, slain by Jehu · 2 Kings 3, 9

👑 Athaliah
c.841 BC · of the house of Ahab; married Joram of Judah; seized Judah's throne as sole reigning queen ~841-835 BC · 2 Kings 8, 11
(2 Kings 8:18 calls her daughter of Ahab; 8:26 daughter of Omri)

👑 Jehu
c.841 BC · usurper anointed to end the house of Omri; slew Joram & Jezebel; founded the house of Jehu · 2 Kings 9-10

👑 Jehoahaz of Israel
c.814 BC · son of Jehu; king of Israel · 2 Kings 13

👑 Jehoash (Joash) of Israel
c.798 BC · son of Jehoahaz; king of Israel · 2 Kings 13-14

👑 Jeroboam II
c.782 BC · son of Jehoash; longest-reigning northern king, expanded Israel · 2 Kings 14

👑 Zechariah of Israel
c.753 BC · son of Jeroboam II; reigned 6 months, last of the house of Jehu · 2 Kings 15

👑 Shallum
c.752 BC · usurper who killed Zechariah and reigned 1 month · 2 Kings 15

👑 Menahem
c.751 BC · usurper who killed Shallum; paid tribute to Assyria · 2 Kings 15

👑 Pekahiah
c.742 BC · son of Menahem; king of Israel · 2 Kings 15

👑 Pekah
c.740 BC · officer who assassinated Pekahiah & usurped the throne · 2 Kings 15

👑 Hoshea
c.732 BC · usurper who killed Pekah; last king of Israel; Samaria fell to Assyria 722 BC · 2 Kings 17

👑 Jehoiakim (Eliakim)
c.635 BC · son of Josiah; Egypt-installed, then Babylonian vassal · 2 Kings 23-24

👑 Jehoahaz of Judah (Shallum)
c.633 BC · son of Josiah; reigned 3 months in 609 BC, deposed by Pharaoh Neco · 2 Kings 23

👑 Zedekiah (Mattaniah)
c.618 BC · youngest son of Josiah; last king of Judah, blinded & exiled to Babylon 586 BC · 2 Kings 24-25
